sprints.title: AgentForge v6.4.1 — Claude -p Subprocess Auth

items.title: Switch AgentRuntime to claude -p subprocess auth
items.description: Replace direct Anthropic API key calls with claude -p subprocess invocations so the autonomous loop authenticates via the logged-in Claude Code Max/Pro session — no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable required. Commit: 56135da.

successCriteria: AgentRuntime uses claude -p subprocess instead of direct API key
Autonomous loop runs without ANTHROPIC_API_KEY set
